opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I was checking myself tonight and I found lumps in my scrotum, and my testicles feel small and hard. We've been trying for a baby for two years with nothing, and now I'm terrified this is advanced cancer and I'm going to die. My heart is pounding and I can't calm down.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Found new lumps on self-examination tonight and had a panic attack; wants to know urgently whether it is cancer.

symptom_narrative.onset: noticed the lumps tonight during a self-check
symptom_narrative.duration: a few hours of intense worry since finding them
symptom_narrative.character: one side feels like a soft bag of worms; both testicles feel unusually small and firm to me
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: no actual pain, but the fear is overwhelming
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: in the scrotum, both sides, and the testicles themselves
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant worry since I found them tonight
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing, I keep re-checking and googling
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: reading about testicular cancer online makes the panic worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no pain, no burning when I wee, no fevers; heart racing and breathing fast from the panic
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've felt the bag-of-worms thing on the left before but never worried about it until tonight
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: pacing around the house, can't sleep, hyperventilating

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: bad case of mumps as a teenager that made my testicles swollen and painful at the time
we have been trying to conceive for about two years with no success

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: a lot of stress at home about not being able to have a baby; very anxious about my health tonight

communication_style.typical_message_style: rapid, fearful messages fixated on cancer and death

objective_data_offered.value: my heart feels like it's pounding and I'm breathing really fast from the panic
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-described sensation during acute anxiety, not a measured vital sign

objective_data_offered.value: patient visibly sweaty, speaking very fast, pacing and hyperventilating on video
I can feel a soft squishy bag-of-worms lump on the left side and both balls feel small and firm to me
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own lay self-examination; cannot be relied on to characterise a scrotal mass
